snippet: Good morning Denys, As soon as i got the confirmation from the Vlaams Woningfonds we can meet for the keys. For me it is still possible to meet this Friday or next Friday at 9.30 in the morning. Kind
subject: RE: FW: Immoweb - Reactie op zoekertje Te huur
body:
Good morning Denys,

As soon as i got the confirmation from the Vlaams Woningfonds we can meet for the keys.
For me it is still possible to meet this Friday or next Friday at 9.30 in the morning.

Kind regards,

Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B
2970  Schilde
0475/677 696

From: Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>
Sent: maandag 9 februari 2026 22:35
To: Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be>
Subject: Re: FW: Immoweb - Reactie op zoekertje Te huur


Dear,

Thank you for your message.

I will try to resolve the issue with the blocked account and the Vlaams Woningfonds by Wednesday.

We can arrange a meeting on Thursday or Friday after my work, around 5:00 PM.
Alternatively, we could meet next week — for example, next Friday, as I am free that day.

Please let me know if any of these options suit you.

Kind regards,
Denys

пн, 9 февр. 2026 г. в 09:10, Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be<mailto:info@lhermitage.be>>:
Dear,

In attachment the signed contract.
The last page of the contract was not signed.

Can you please send it to me?

As soon as we receive the guarantee we can meet for the keys.

Can you let me know when it would be possible to arrange this so I can plan this in my agenda?

Thank you and kind regards,

Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B
2970  Schilde
0475/677 696

From: Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com<mailto:denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>>
Sent: vrijdag 6 februari 2026 17:33
To: Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be<mailto:info@lhermitage.be>>
Subject: Re: FW: Immoweb - Reactie op zoekertje Te huur

Good afternoon,

My apologies for the mistake.

I will sign the contract on every page and send it back to you as soon as possible.

Thank you for your understanding.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov

пт, 6 февр. 2026 г., 13:53 Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com<mailto:denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>>:
Dear Ms. Worms,

Thank you for your message.

I would like to kindly ask whether it is essential for you to receive the signed contract today, or if it would be possible to wait until Wednesday, when the rental guarantee is expected to be fully completed.

I want to make sure that everything is properly arranged before signing.

Thank you very much for your understanding.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov

пт, 6 февр. 2026 г., 13:35 Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be<mailto:info@lhermitage.be>>:
Dear,

Thank you very much.
Can you please send me the signed contract?
As soon as I got the documents of the guarantee we can make an appointment for the keys.

Kind regards and a fine weekend,

Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B<https://www.google.com/maps/search/Sint+Jobsteenweg+21+B+%0D%0A+2970++Schilde?entry=gmail&source=g>
2970 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Sint+Jobsteenweg+21+B+%0D%0A+2970++Schilde?entry=gmail&source=g>  Schilde<https://www.google.com/maps/search/Sint+Jobsteenweg+21+B+%0D%0A+2970++Schilde?entry=gmail&source=g>
0475/677 696

From: Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com<mailto:denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>>
Sent: vrijdag 6 februari 2026 12:52
To: Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be<mailto:info@lhermitage.be>>
Subject: Re: FW: Immoweb - Reactie op zoekertje Te huur

Dear Ms. Worms,

Thank you very much for the contract. I really appreciate it.

Today, as I have a day off, I started the process of opening a blocked account. The account has been created, but because the appointment was without prior arrangement, I could not complete everything, and the finalization has been postponed until next Tuesday.

In parallel, I have already sent the account details to the Flanders Housing Fund. It is possible that they will transfer the deposit to this account by Tuesday. If not, I will deposit my own funds, as I have the amount available.

Therefore, I expect to be able to provide the guarantee by Wednesday next week.

Please let me know if you need any additional information from my side.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov

пт, 6 февр. 2026 г., 12:43 Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be<mailto:info@lhermitage.be>>:
Good afternoon Denys,

Forgot to ask you to sign the contract on every page please and to send it back to me.
As soon as I have a signed contract I will sign it too.  But as long as I don’t have this document I can’t take it of Immoweb.
I hope you understand.

Kind regards,

Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B<https://www.google.com/maps/search/Sint+Jobsteenweg+21+B+%0D%0A+2970++Schilde?entry=gmail&source=g>

From: Info - L'hermitage
Sent: vrijdag 6 februari 2026 8:56
To: 'Denys Maiorov' <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com<mailto:denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>>
Subject: RE: Immoweb - Reactie op zoekertje Te huur

Good morning Denys,

In attachment you can find your contract.
The starting date is 1st of March.
As soon as I got the deposit of 3 months rent without provision (= 2.250,-€) I can give you the keys.

You can or deposit the guaranty on a blocked account or send it to our account on the number BE76 0688 9499 6795 from l’Hermitage NV.
Then we will deposit it to our intern deposit account.

If you have any questions please contact me.

Kind regards,

Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B<https://www.google.com/maps/search/Sint+Jobsteenweg+21+B+%0D%0A+2970++Schilde?entry=gmail&source=g>

To: Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be<mailto:info@lhermitage.be>>

I’m sorry for the mistake with your name in my previous message. My apologies, Ms. Worms.

ср, 4 февр. 2026 г., 10:22 Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com<mailto:denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>>:
Beste mevrouw Worms,

Bedankt voor uw bericht en de uitnodiging.

Helaas kunnen noch ik, noch mijn vertegenwoordiger morgen om 8u30 aanwezig zijn. Dit tijdstip past voor ons niet.

Is het mogelijk om een andere afspraak in te plannen op een later moment?

Alvast bedankt voor uw begrip.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Denys Maiorov

ср, 4 февр. 2026 г., 10:03 Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be<mailto:info@lhermitage.be>>:
Beste,

Het gaat over een gerenoveerd appartement met 1 slaapkamer, badkamer, ingerichte keuken, aparte toilet en badkamer.
Morgen heb ik om 8u30 een bezoek ingepland en bent u ook van harte welkom.

Past dit voor u?

Mvg,

Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
